mapper.update: WITH visit_stats AS ( SELECT customer_id, MAX(transaction_date) AS "last_visit_date", MIN(transaction_date) AS "first_visit_date", COUNT(*) AS "visit_count" FROM dwh.fact_sales WHERE app_company_id = #{companyId} AND is_void = false GROUP BY customer_id ) UPDATE dwh.dim_customers dc SET last_visit_date = vs.last_visit_date, first_visit_date = vs.first_visit_date, visit_count = vs.visit_count, update_data_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM visit_stats vs WHERE dc.customer_id = vs.customer_id AND dc.app_company_id = #{companyId} AND dc.is_deleted = false
